title: Azure for Researchers part 1: Introduction to Cloud Computing
summary: When you're working on research projects, it's helpful to have a basic understanding of cloud computing concepts. In this learning path, you study the general terminology and services that of cloud computing, which should be useful to you when you're working on research tasks. You learn how to create virtual machine and how to use it, and how to pick the best storage solution to persist your data.

sections.title: Azure for Researchers part 1: Introduction to Cloud Computing
sections.summary: When you're working on research projects, it's helpful to have a basic understanding of cloud computing concepts. In this learning path, you study the general terminology and services that of cloud computing, which should be useful to you when you're working on research tasks. You learn how to create virtual machine and how to use it, and how to pick the best storage solution to persist your data.

lessons.title: Introduction to Azure virtual machines
lessons.content_md:
Learn about the decisions you make before creating a virtual machine, the options to create and manage the VM, and the extensions and services you use to manage your VM.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/intro-to-azure-virtual-machines/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Create an Azure Storage account
lessons.content_md:
Discover ways to use an Azure Storage account to manage your data for billing, access, and storage location of your blobs, files, queues, and tables.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/create-azure-storage-account/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Azure for Researchers part 1: Introduction to Cloud Computing
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Azure for Researchers part 1: Introduction to Cloud Computing**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
